passives.desc:
When joining after Wave 2, enter with 30 SP
All units participating in this battle cannot retreat
passives.name: Night in the Backstreets

descs: On Hit with this Coin, heal 30% of the HP damage dealt
[OnSucceedAttackHead] Reuse this Coin (3 times per Skill)

descs: [OnSucceedAttack] Activate [Laceration] on the target once (reduce [Laceration] Count by 1)
